title: Weekly Concept Neon Board
objective: Survive a 3-minute review rush by clearing as many moving concept orbs as possible, building combo multipliers, and avoiding 3 missed orbs.

controls.outcome: Scores points and extends your combo if the orb is cleared before its ring closes.

controls.input: Tap the highlighted weekly orb next
controls.outcome: Adds bonus points and increases the multiplier faster.

controls.input: Tap a flashing cracked lane marker
controls.outcome: Prevents a pending lane lock after a miss and buys a moment of breathing room.

steps: Neon concept orbs slide across a vertical weekly board in clearly marked lanes, each with a shrinking outer ring that telegraphs its vanish.
Tap normal blue orbs for base points, then prioritize the gold weekly orb when it appears because it boosts combo by 2 steps instead of 1.
Every 20 seconds the board speeds up, lane patterns widen, and pink decoy scribble-orbs start weaving between real targets.
Missing a real orb, tapping a decoy, or letting a lane crack fully removes combo and adds 1 strike.
At 3 strikes, the review session fails and your score is submitted to the local on-device weekly leaderboard.
A short synth loop accelerates with the game pace, while distinct chimes signal perfect taps, combo tier-ups, danger rings, and final-strike
scoreի? Let's fix invalid accidental text.
scoring: Normal orb: 10 points. Weekly orb: 25 points. Combo multiplier starts at x1 and increases every 5 clean hits up to x5; weekly orbs count double toward the multiplier. Clearing 3 orbs in under 2 seconds triggers a Briefed
tips: Watch the outer ring, not just the orb path; the ring gives the clearest vanish timing.
Use the center thumb zone and let side-lane orbs come to you when the speed ramps up.
Save focus for gold weekly orbs because they rebuild combo faster after a mistake.
